description: Starts a focused subagent task in a separate child session and waits for completion.

slug.description: Very short symbolic name used for child session UI/log markers. Generate from title like worktree symbolic names: lowercase letters/digits/dashes only, max 20 chars, 2-4 concise words, no spaces/slashes/underscores/punctuation. Must be unique in current parent session.

title.description: Short user-facing status title shown while subagent runs.

prompt.description: Full initial prompt for the child subagent session.

role.description: Optional child role override. Defaults to parent session role when omitted.

model.description: Optional child model override in provider/model format. Defaults to parent session model when omitted.

thinking.description: Optional child thinking override. Defaults to parent session thinking when omitted.
